visa_types.overview:
Overview
A B/2 visa is granted to someone who wishes to stay in Israel for only a short time (for a visit, tourism, a business meeting or study in a Hebrew ulpan). A person who enters Israel on a B/2 visa is not allowed to work in the State of Israel.
A B/2 visa is valid for up to three months from the date of issue. The duration of the stay in Israel will be determined by the Border Police. A visitor who wishes to extend his visit may submit an application at one of the regional population administration offices of the Ministry of the Interior.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A B/2 visa is granted to someone who wishes to stay in Israel for only a short time (for a visit, tourism, a business meeting or study in a Hebrew ulpan). A person who enters Israel on a B/2 visa is not allowed to work in the State of Israel.
A B/2 visa is valid for up to three months from the date of issue. The duration of the stay in Israel will be determined by the Border Police. A visitor who wishes to extend his visit may submit an application at one of the regional population administration offices of the Ministry of the Interior.

## Visa Fees And Service Charge
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. The Visa fees are determined based on your Nationality and Type of Entry to Isreal. Please refer to the table given below to know your visa fees.

[Table:  B2 Visitor's visa]

[Table:  B2 Visitor's visa]

## Documents Required
Click Here for Document Checklist
* The consul may request additional documents.
* Even though all the required documents are submitted and procedures are fulfilled, the Embassy would have right to decide whether to issue visa or not, without mentioning any reasons.
* Since the fee is collected for handling the application, it will not be refunded to the applicant if the visa is not issued for any reason.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit two photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Not more than 6 months old
- 2 X 2 inch
- Colored, with plain white background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- without glasses and headgears in civil dress
- On a good quality paper

## Processing Time
The Israeli Embassy take at least 14 calendar days to process your application for an Israel visitor entry visa.

## Download Forms
- APPLICATION FOR A VISA TO ENTER ISRAEL
- Quarantine Form
- Parental consent to granting a visa / residence permit / status in Israel for minor child (https://www.mfa.gov.il/MFA_Graphics/MFA%20Gallery/Consular%20forms/ParentalConsentVisa.pdf)
- Application for an entry permit to Israel during the COVID-19 pandemic for passengers traveling with a foreign passport (https://govforms.gov.il/mw/forms/knisalisrael@mofa.gov.il)

visa_types.name: Student visa (A2)
visa_types.documents_required:
Student's Visa (A2)
Click Here for Document Checklist
Note: The Consul may request additional documents.
*.All the documents must be attested from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Nepal Government.
*. All the original documents also must be submitted with the visa application.
PLEASE NOTE: A MINOR WILL NOT BE GIVEN A VISA WITHOUT THE WRITTEN CONSENT OF BOTH PARENTS OR HIS LEGAL GUARDIAN.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is granted to those who want to study in Israel in elementary and high schools, academic institutions, yeshivot and youth institutions of the Jewish Agency. The visa is valid for up to one year and for multiple entrances and exits. Recipients of this visa are not permitted to work in Israel.
- LIST OF RECOGNIZED INSTITUTIONS OF HIGHER EDUCATION IN ISRAEL (http://che.org.il/wp-content/uploads/2013/01/%D7%A8%D7%A9%D7%99%D7%9E%D7%AA-%D7%9E%D7%95%D7%A1%D7%93%D7%95%D7%AA-%D7%90%D7%95%D7%92%D7%95%D7%A1%D7%98-2016.pdf)
(HEBREW)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is granted to those who want to study in Israel in elementary and high schools, academic institutions, yeshivot and youth institutions of the Jewish Agency. The visa is valid for up to one year and for multiple entrances and exits. Recipients of this visa are not permitted to work in Israel.
- LIST OF RECOGNIZED INSTITUTIONS OF HIGHER EDUCATION IN ISRAEL (http://che.org.il/wp-content/uploads/2013/01/%D7%A8%D7%A9%D7%99%D7%9E%D7%AA-%D7%9E%D7%95%D7%A1%D7%93%D7%95%D7%AA-%D7%90%D7%95%D7%92%D7%95%D7%A1%D7%98-2016.pdf)
(HEBREW)

## Visa Fees And Service Charge
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. The Visa fees are determined based on your Nationality and Type of Entry to Isreal. Please refer to the table given below to know your visa fees.

[Table:  Student visa (A2) ]

[Table:  Student visa (A2) ]

## Documents Required
Student's Visa (A2)
Click Here for Document Checklist
Note: The Consul may request additional documents.
*.All the documents must be attested from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Nepal Government.
*. All the original documents also must be submitted with the visa application.
PLEASE NOTE: A MINOR WILL NOT BE GIVEN A VISA WITHOUT THE WRITTEN CONSENT OF BOTH PARENTS OR HIS LEGAL GUARDIAN.

## Photo Specifications
PLEASE SUBMIT ONE PHOTOGRAPH ALONG WITH YOUR VISA APPLICATION. THE PHOTOGRAPH MUST BE:
- NOT MORE THAN 6 MONTHS OLD
- 2 X 2 INCH
- COLORED, WITH PLAIN WHITE BACKGROUND
- TAKEN LOOKING STRAIGHT FORWARD AND FACE SEEN CLEARLY
- WITHOUT GLASSES AND HEADGEARS IN CIVIL DRESS
- ON A GOOD QUALITY PAPER

## Processing Time
THE ISRAELI EMBASSY TAKE AT LEAST 14 CALENDAR DAYS TO PROCESS YOUR APPLICATION.

## Download Forms
- APPLICATION FOR A VISA TO ENTER ISRAEL
- Quarantine Form
- PARENTAL CONSENT TO GRANTING A VISA / RESIDENCE PERMIT / STATUS IN ISRAEL FOR MINOR CHILD (https://www.mfa.gov.il/MFA_Graphics/MFA%20Gallery/Consular%20forms/ParentalConsentVisa.pdf)
- Application for an entry permit to Israel during the COVID-19 pandemic for passengers traveling with a foreign passport (https://govforms.gov.il/mw/forms/knisalisrael@mofa.gov.il)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A Service visa is granted to someone who wishes to stay in Israel for going to work in Israel from UN organization, Army/ police going to Israel for Peace mission (Tank driver, technician, medical personnel, senior staffs, etc.), NGO (save the children, Red cross, Jica etc.)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A Service visa is granted to someone who wishes to stay in Israel for going to work in Israel from UN organization, Army/ police going to Israel for Peace mission (Tank driver, technician, medical personnel, senior staffs, etc.), NGO (save the children, Red cross, Jica etc.)

## Visa Fees And Service Charge
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. The Visa fees are determined based on your Nationality and Type of Entry to Isreal. Please refer to the table given below to know your visa fees.

[Table:  Service visa]

[Table:  Service visa]

## Documents Required
CLICK HERE FOR DOCUMENT CHECKLIST
* The consul may request additional documents.
* Even though all the required documents are submitted and procedures are fulfilled, the Embassy would have right to decide whether to issue visa or not, without mentioning any reasons.
* Since the fee is collected for handling the application, it will not be refunded to the applicant if the visa is not issued for any reason.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit two photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Not more than 6 months old
- 2 X 2 inch
- Colored, with plain white background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- without glasses and headgears in civil dress
- On a good quality paper

## Processing Time
The Israeli Embassy take at least 14 calendar days to process your application for an Israel visitor entry visa.

## Download Forms
- Application for a Visa to Enter Israel
- Quarantine Form
- Parental consent to granting a visa / residence permit / status in Israel for minor child (https://www.mfa.gov.il/MFA_Graphics/MFA%20Gallery/Consular%20forms/ParentalConsentVisa.pdf)
- Application for an entry permit to Israel during the COVID-19 pandemic for passengers traveling with a foreign passport (https://govforms.gov.il/mw/forms/knisalisrael@mofa.gov.il)

visa_types.name: Work Permit Visa (B1)
visa_types.documents_required:
Click Here for Document Checklist
Note: The Consul may request additional documents.
The validity of the B/1 Work visa will be in accordance with Ministry of Interior guidelines. The worker must enter Israel within the period of time specified in the visa and stay in the country as specified in the visa. A person who receives such a visa may apply to one of the population administration offices of the Ministry of the Interior to extend the visa.
*. All the documents must be attested from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Nepal Government.
*. All the original documents also must be submitted with the visa application

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for a person whose stay in Israel is approved for a limited period of time for the purpose of work. This visa is given to experts and artists, among others, and is granted solely with the approval of the Ministry of the Interior.
The fee is paid by the applicant when the application is submitted to one of the population administration offices of the Ministry of the Interior. Upon receipt of approval from the Ministry of the Interior, the mission will issue the B/1 Work visa after interviewing the applicant and obtaining visa application documents:
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for a person whose stay in Israel is approved for a limited period of time for the purpose of work. This visa is given to experts and artists, among others, and is granted solely with the approval of the Ministry of the Interior.
The fee is paid by the applicant when the application is submitted to one of the population administration offices of the Ministry of the Interior. Upon receipt of approval from the Ministry of the Interior, the mission will issue the B/1 Work visa after interviewing the applicant and obtaining visa application documents:

## Visa Fees And Service Charge
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. The Visa fees are determined based on your Nationality and Type of Entry to Isreal. Please refer to the table given below to know your visa fees.

[Table:  Work Permit Visa (B1)]

[Table:  Work Permit Visa (B1)]

## Documents Required
Click Here for Document Checklist
Note: The Consul may request additional documents.
The validity of the B/1 Work visa will be in accordance with Ministry of Interior guidelines. The worker must enter Israel within the period of time specified in the visa and stay in the country as specified in the visa. A person who receives such a visa may apply to one of the population administration offices of the Ministry of the Interior to extend the visa.
*. All the documents must be attested from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Nepal Government.
*. All the original documents also must be submitted with the visa application

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Not more than 6 months old
- 2 X 2 inch
- Colored, with plain white background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- without glasses and headgears in civil dress
- On a good quality paper

## Processing Time
THE ISRAELI EMBASSY TAKE AT LEAST 14 CALENDAR DAYS TO PROCESS YOUR APPLICATION.

## Download Forms
- APPLICATION FOR A VISA TO ENTER ISRAEL
- Quarantine Form
- Parental consent to granting a visa / residence permit / status in Israel for minor child (https://www.mfa.gov.il/MFA_Graphics/MFA%20Gallery/Consular%20forms/ParentalConsentVisa.pdf)
- Application for an entry permit to Israel during the COVID-19 pandemic for passengers traveling with a foreign passport (https://govforms.gov.il/mw/forms/knisalisrael@mofa.gov.il)

visa_types.name: Verification Services
visa_types.overview:
Applicant can submit their documents for verification at the Israel Visa Application Centre. Documents will be accepted and sent to Israel embassy in Kathmandu for verification and it can be collected once received from the embassy. 

[Verification Services]
Please note: All documents needs to be in English and attested from Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Consular Section.
visa_types.full_text:
Applicant can submit their documents for verification at the Israel Visa Application Centre. Documents will be accepted and sent to Israel embassy in Kathmandu for verification and it can be collected once received from the embassy. 

[Verification Services]
Please note: All documents needs to be in English and attested from Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Consular Section.
